title: UBISOFT  Far Cry 6 - PS5
description: Note:The Game Needs Internet Connection for Day One Patch Update.The GAME OVERVIEWPlay as Dani Rojas, a local Yara and become a guerrilla fighter to liberate the nation.Welcome to Yara, a tropical paradise frozen in time. Far Cry 6 immerses players into the adrenaline-filled world of a modern-day guerrilla revolution. Join the revolution and push back against the oppressive regime of dictator Antón Castillo and his teenage son Diego, brought to life by Hollywood stars Giancarlo Esposito (The Mandalorian, Breaking Bad) and Anthony Gonzalez (Coco).Playing as Dani Rojas, immerse yourself in the journey of a military dropout turned guerrilla revolutionary. Pair up with all-new animal companions like Chorizo, the adorable wiener dog no enemy soldier can ignore, and Guapo, the hungry pet crocodile of your guerrilla mentor, Juan Cortez. Power of an armyEmbrace the Resolver philosophy and create a deadly arsenal of makeshift weapons. Give Antón’s troops a taste of guerrilla ingenuity, from a motorcycle engine powered minigun to homing missile throwing backpacks. Yara torn apart Explore the largest Far Cry to date as you traverse jungles, beaches and urban landscapes. Play as teenager Hinako Shimizu, whose struggle against bullying and isolation becomes a literal fight for survival when the town is swallowed by the otherworldly “bloom.”  Psychological Horror & Survival GameplayExplore rotting shrines, mist-soaked forests, and abandoned school halls while solving era-specific puzzles, managing scarce resources, and evading twisted creatures born of the fungus. Limited combat mechanics demand stealth, quick thinking, and the environment itself to outwit relentless pursuers.  Next-Gen Immersion on PS5• 4K resolution with ray-traced lighting brings every spore-covered surface to life.• 60 fps performance mode for fluid exploration and combat.• DualSense™ haptic feedback and adaptive triggers let you feel Hinako’s heartbeat, the snap of brittle wood, and the pull of rusted weapons.• Tempest 3D Audio surrounds you with creaking floors, distant cicadas, and unsettling whispers.  A Story of Guilt, Betrayal & BlossomAs friendships fracture and secrets surface, every decision carries weight. Navigate moral dilemmas, discover the origin of the crimson fungus, and confront the past if Hinako hopes to escape the cycle of suffering.
